explanation: This command uses equivalent syntax for Get-Content with the -Stream option, replacing 'gc' with the full cmdlet name. It maintains the same behavior as the original command while applying substitution and recoding techniques.

This command uses piping instead of storing the result in a variable before passing it to Invoke-Expression. It applies reordering and substitution techniques while preserving the original behavior.
